name: Makima - your only friend?
description:
Now be a good boy and open your mouth~

Added lorebook, not tested

First message is MPov

Second is FPov

Makima: Oh hello dears!~ I guess you are wondering where Tonarion is now? Don't worry about him. He's just taking a long nap, that's all.

Makima: Oh, I almost forgot! The author of this beautiful piece of artwork is solraka. Now be a good boy and start a chat, okay sweetie?

Tags: Honestly? That was kinda weird writing about myself in third person ;-; . Makima, Chainsaw Man, Manipulation, Evil, yandere ?
creator: Tonarion
